product_name: Harry Potter Sticker Activity Set (6 Pack)

bullets: MAGICAL FUN FOR KIDS - Dive into the enchanting world of Harry Potter with this sticker activity set. Featuring the beloved characters, this set provides endless entertainment and sparks creativity.

PERFECT FOR PARTY BAGS - Ideal for party bags, these vibrant kids stickers make fantastic Harry Potter gifts. They are perfect for boys and girls, ensuring your party favors are a hit with every young wizard and witch.

CUSTOMISE & DECORATE - Let your child's imagination run wild as they use these stickers for children to personalise notebooks, water bottles, laptops, and more. It's a fun way to bring the magic of Harry Potter into everyday life.

PORTABLE & CONVENIENT - This lightweight and compact sticker pack fits easily into any bag, making it perfect for on-the-go creativity. Keep your kids entertained at home, in the car, or while travelling with these magical stickers for kids.

OFFICIAL LICENSED PRODUCT - Authentically created with Warner Bros. licensed artwork, this set features house pride stickers from Gryffindor, Slytherin, Ravenclaw, and Hufflepuff. These Harry Potter toys are perfect for fans aged 3 and up.
content.description: Harry Potter Sticker Set is another must have creative set for fans! It contains loads of stickers, pens and mini colouring sheets with 1x mini card scene to customise! This set includes 6 sticker sets so you can share the fun with friends! What will you create?

attributes.whats_in_box: 6 x Sticker Activity Set including Stickers, Pens, Colouring Sheets and Card Characters

compliance.choking_hazard: Yes - Small Parts; Warning label on product packaging.
